1Ôćĺpackage db
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport (
     4Ôćĺ	"context"
     5Ôćĺ	"fmt"
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺ	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
     8Ôćĺ	"github.com/riverqueue/river/riverdriver/riverpgxv5"
     9Ôćĺ	"github.com/riverqueue/river/rivermigrate"
    10Ôćĺ)
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺconst schema = `
    13Ôćĺ-- Tracked software projects (the central entity)
    14ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS projects (
    15Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    16Ôćĺ    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    17Ôćĺ    description TEXT,
    18Ôćĺ    agent_prompt TEXT,
    19Ôćĺ    agent_rules JSONB,
    20Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    21Ôćĺ    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    22Ôćĺ);
    23Ôćĺ
    24Ôćĺ-- Configured ingestion sources (polling-based: GitHub, Docker Hub)
    25ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sources (
    26Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    27Ôćĺ    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    28Ôćĺ    provider VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    29Ôćĺ    repository VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    30Ôćĺ    poll_interval_seconds INT DEFAULT 86400,
    31Ôćĺ    enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
    32Ôćĺ    config JSONB,
    33Ôćĺ    last_polled_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    34Ôćĺ    last_error TEXT,
    35Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    36Ôćĺ    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    37Ôćĺ    UNIQUE(provider, repository)
    38Ôćĺ);
    39Ôćĺ
    40Ôćĺ-- Context sources (read-only references for agent research)
    41ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS context_sources (
    42Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    43Ôćĺ    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    44Ôćĺ    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    45Ôćĺ    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    46Ôćĺ    config JSONB NOT NULL,
    47Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    48Ôćĺ    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    49Ôćĺ);
    50Ôćĺ
    51Ôćĺ-- Source-level releases (detected from polling sources)
    52ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS releases (
    53Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    54Ôćĺ    source_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES sources(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    55Ôćĺ    version VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    56Ôćĺ    raw_data JSONB,
    57Ôćĺ    released_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    58Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    59Ôćĺ    UNIQUE(source_id, version)
    60Ôćĺ);
    61Ôćĺ
    62Ôćĺ-- Project-level semantic releases (AI-generated, correlating source releases)
    63ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS semantic_releases (
    64Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    65Ôćĺ    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    66Ôćĺ    version VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    67Ôćĺ    report JSONB,
    68Ôćĺ    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
    69Ôćĺ    error TEXT,
    70Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    71Ôćĺ    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    72Ôćĺ    UNIQUE(project_id, version)
    73Ôćĺ);
    74Ôćĺ
    75Ôćĺ-- Join table: which source releases compose a semantic release
    76ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS semantic_release_sources (
    77Ôćĺ    semantic_release_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    78Ôćĺ    release_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    79Ôćĺ    PRIMARY KEY (semantic_release_id, release_id)
    80Ôćĺ);
    81Ôćĺ
    82Ôćĺ-- Notification channels (standalone)
    83ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notification_channels (
    84Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    85Ôćĺ    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    86Ôćĺ    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    87Ôćĺ    config JSONB NOT NULL,
    88Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    89Ôćĺ    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    90Ôćĺ);
    91Ôćĺ
    92Ôćĺ-- Subscriptions: two types (source releases and semantic releases)
    93ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subscriptions (
    94Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    95Ôćĺ    channel_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES notification_channels(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    96Ôćĺ    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (type IN ('source_release', 'semantic_release')),
    97Ôćĺ    source_id UUID REFERENCES sources(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    98Ôćĺ    project_id UUID REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    99Ôćĺ    version_filter TEXT,
   100Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   101Ôćĺ    CHECK (
   102Ôćĺ        (type = 'source_release'   AND source_id  IS NOT NULL AND project_id IS NULL) OR
   103Ôćĺ        (type = 'semantic_release' AND project_id IS NOT NULL AND source_id  IS NULL)
   104Ôćĺ    )
   105Ôćĺ);
   106Ôćĺ
   107Ôćĺ-- Agent runs (scoped to project)
   108ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_runs (
   109Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   110Ôćĺ    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   111Ôćĺ    semantic_release_id UUID REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
   112Ôćĺ    trigger VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
   113Ôćĺ    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   114Ôćĺ    prompt_used TEXT,
   115Ôćĺ    error TEXT,
   116Ôćĺ    started_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   117Ôćĺ    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   118Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
   119Ôćĺ);
   120Ôćĺ
   121ÔćĺALTER TABLE agent_runs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version VARCHAR(100);
   122Ôćĺ
   123Ôćĺ-- API authentication keys
   124ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS api_keys (
   125Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   126Ôćĺ    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
   127Ôćĺ    key_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
   128Ôćĺ    key_prefix VARCHAR(12) NOT NULL,
   129Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   130Ôćĺ    last_used_at TIMESTAMPTZ
   131Ôćĺ);
   132Ôćĺ
   133Ôćĺ-- Trigger for SSE: notify on new releases
   134ÔćĺCREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION notify_release_created() RETURNS trigger AS $$
   135ÔćĺBEGIN
   136Ôćĺ    PERFORM pg_notify('release_events', json_build_object('type', 'release', 'id', NEW.id)::text);
   137Ôćĺ    RETURN NEW;
   138ÔćĺEND;
   139Ôćĺ$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
   140Ôćĺ
   141ÔćĺDROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS release_created_trigger ON releases;
   142ÔćĺCREATE TRIGGER release_created_trigger
   143Ôćĺ    AFTER INSERT ON releases
   144Ôćĺ    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION notify_release_created();
   145Ôćĺ
   146Ôćĺ-- Trigger for SSE: notify on semantic release completion
   147ÔćĺCREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION notify_semantic_release() RETURNS trigger AS $$
   148ÔćĺBEGIN
   149Ôćĺ    IF NEW.status = 'completed' AND (OLD IS NULL OR OLD.status != 'completed') THEN
   150Ôćĺ        PERFORM pg_notify('release_events', json_build_object('type', 'semantic_release', 'id', NEW.id)::text);
   151Ôćĺ    END IF;
   152Ôćĺ    RETURN NEW;
   153ÔćĺEND;
   154Ôćĺ$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
   155Ôćĺ
   156ÔćĺDROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS semantic_release_trigger ON semantic_releases;
   157ÔćĺCREATE TRIGGER semantic_release_trigger
   158Ôćĺ    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE ON semantic_releases
   159Ôćĺ    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION notify_semantic_release();
   160Ôćĺ
   161Ôćĺ-- Release TODOs (acknowledge/resolve tracking)
   162ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS release_todos (
   163Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   164Ôćĺ    release_id UUID REFERENCES releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   165Ôćĺ    semantic_release_id UUID REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   166Ôćĺ    status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   167Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   168Ôćĺ    acknowledged_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   169Ôćĺ    resolved_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   170Ôćĺ    CHECK (
   171Ôćĺ        (release_id IS NOT NULL AND semantic_release_id IS NULL) OR
   172Ôćĺ        (release_id IS NULL AND semantic_release_id IS NOT NULL)
   173Ôćĺ    )
   174Ôćĺ);
   175ÔćĺCREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_release_todos_release_id ON release_todos(release_id) WHERE release_id IS NOT NULL;
   176ÔćĺCREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_release_todos_semantic_release_id ON release_todos(semantic_release_id) WHERE semantic_release_id IS NOT NULL;
   177Ôćĺ
   178Ôćĺ-- Onboarding scans (GitHub repo dependency detection)
   179ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS onboard_scans (
   180Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   181Ôćĺ    repo_url TEXT NOT NULL,
   182Ôćĺ    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   183Ôćĺ    results JSONB,
   184Ôćĺ    error TEXT,
   185Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   186Ôćĺ    started_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   187Ôćĺ    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ
   188Ôćĺ);
   189Ôćĺ`
   190Ôćĺ
   191Ôćĺ// RunMigrations applies River's schema and the application schema. Idempotent ÔÇö safe to call on every startup.
   192Ôćĺfunc RunMigrations(ctx context.Context, pool *pgxpool.Pool) error {
   193Ôćĺ	migrator, err := rivermigrate.New(riverpgxv5.New(pool), nil)
   194Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   195Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("create river migrator: %w", err)
   196Ôćĺ	}
   197Ôćĺ	if _, err := migrator.Migrate(ctx, rivermigrate.DirectionUp, nil); err != nil {
   198Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("river migrations: %w", err)
   199Ôćĺ	}
   200Ôćĺ
   201Ôćĺ	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, schema); err != nil {
   202Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("app migrations: %w", err)
   203Ôćĺ	}
   204Ôćĺ
   205Ôćĺ	// Migrate existing subscription type values: sourceÔćĺsource_release, projectÔćĺsemantic_release.
   206Ôćĺ	// Drop old CHECK constraints first (both the named type check and the unnamed
   207Ôćĺ	// composite check referencing old values), then UPDATE data, then re-add constraints.
   208Ôćĺ	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   209Ôćĺ		ALTER TABLE subscriptions DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS subscriptions_type_check;
   210Ôćĺ		ALTER TABLE subscriptions DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS subscriptions_check;
   211Ôćĺ		UPDATE subscriptions SET type = 'source_release' WHERE type = 'source';
   212Ôćĺ		UPDATE subscriptions SET type = 'semantic_release' WHERE type = 'project';
   213Ôćĺ		ALTER TABLE subscriptions ADD CONSTRAINT subscriptions_type_check CHECK (type IN ('source_release', 'semantic_release'));
   214Ôćĺ		ALTER TABLE subscriptions ADD CONSTRAINT subscriptions_check CHECK (
   215Ôćĺ			(type = 'source_release'   AND source_id IS NOT NULL AND project_id IS NULL) OR
   216Ôćĺ			(type = 'semantic_release' AND project_id IS NOT NULL AND source_id IS NULL)
   217Ôćĺ		);
   218Ôćĺ	`); err != nil {
   219Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("subscription type migration: %w", err)
   220Ôćĺ	}
   221Ôćĺ
   222Ôćĺ	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   223Ôćĺ		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version_filter_include TEXT;
   224Ôćĺ		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version_filter_exclude TEXT;
   225Ôćĺ	`); err != nil {
   226Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("source version filter migration: %w", err)
   227Ôćĺ	}
   228Ôćĺ
   229Ôćĺ	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   230Ôćĺ		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS exclude_prereleases BOOLEAN DEFAULT false;
   231Ôćĺ	`); err != nil {
   232Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("source exclude_prereleases migration: %w", err)
   233Ôćĺ	}
   234Ôćĺ	return nil
   235Ôćĺ}
   236Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺpackage main
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport (
     4Ôćĺ	"context"
     5Ôćĺ	"log/slog"
     6Ôćĺ	"net/http"
     7Ôćĺ	"os"
     8Ôćĺ	"os/signal"
     9Ôćĺ	"time"
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺ	"github.com/riverqueue/river"
    12Ôćĺ	agentpkg "github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/agent"
    13Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/api"
    14Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/db"
    15Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion"
    16Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/onboard"
    17Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/queue"
    18Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing"
    19Ôćĺ)
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺfunc main() {
    22Ôćĺ	// Configure log level from LOG_LEVEL env (debug, info, warn, error).
    23Ôćĺ	logLevel := new(slog.LevelVar) // defaults to Info
    24Ôćĺ	switch os.Getenv("LOG_LEVEL") {
    25Ôćĺ	case "debug":
    26Ôćĺ		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelDebug)
    27Ôćĺ	case "warn":
    28Ôćĺ		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelWarn)
    29Ôćĺ	case "error":
    30Ôćĺ		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelError)
    31Ôćĺ	}
    32Ôćĺ	slog.SetDefault(slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stderr, &slog.HandlerOptions{Level: logLevel})))
    33Ôćĺ
    34Ôćĺ	ctx, stop := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt)
    35Ôćĺ	defer stop()
    36Ôćĺ
    37Ôćĺ	dbURL := envOr("DATABASE_URL", "postgres://localhost:5432/changelogue?sslmode=disable")
    38Ôćĺ	addr := envOr("LISTEN_ADDR", ":8080")
    39Ôćĺ	noAuth := os.Getenv("NO_AUTH") == "true"
    40Ôćĺ
    41Ôćĺ	// Database
    42Ôćĺ	pool, err := db.NewPool(ctx, dbURL)
    43Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    44Ôćĺ		slog.Error("database connection failed", "err", err)
    45Ôćĺ		os.Exit(1)
    46Ôćĺ	}
    47Ôćĺ	defer pool.Close()
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ	if err := db.RunMigrations(ctx, pool); err != nil {
    50Ôćĺ		slog.Error("migrations failed", "err", err)
    51Ôćĺ		os.Exit(1)
    52Ôćĺ	}
    53Ôćĺ
    54Ôćĺ	// API & routing store (created before River so we can register workers)
    55Ôćĺ	// The river client is set to nil initially; TriggerAgentRun (which needs it)
    56Ôćĺ	// won't be called until the server is up and the client is set below.
    57Ôćĺ	pgStore := api.NewPgStore(pool, nil)
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ	// Register River workers
    60Ôćĺ	workers := river.NewWorkers()
    61Ôćĺ	notifyWorker := routing.NewNotifyWorker(pgStore, os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"))
    62Ôćĺ	river.AddWorker(workers, notifyWorker)
    63Ôćĺ
    64Ôćĺ	// Agent worker: requires an LLM API key. If unavailable, agent jobs
    65Ôćĺ	// will remain in the queue until the key is configured and the server
    66Ôćĺ	// is restarted.
    67Ôćĺ	llmProvider := envOr("LLM_PROVIDER", "gemini")
    68Ôćĺ	llmModelDefault := "gemini-2.5-flash"
    69Ôćĺ	if llmProvider == "openai" {
    70Ôćĺ		llmModelDefault = "gpt-5.2"
    71Ôćĺ	}
    72Ôćĺ	llmConfig := agentpkg.LLMConfig{
    73Ôćĺ		Provider:      llmProvider,
    74Ôćĺ		Model:         envOr("LLM_MODEL", llmModelDefault),
    75Ôćĺ		GoogleAPIKey:  os.Getenv("GOOGLE_API_KEY"),
    76Ôćĺ		OpenAIAPIKey:  os.Getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY"),
    77Ôćĺ		OpenAIBaseURL: os.Getenv("OPENAI_BASE_URL"),
    78Ôćĺ	}
    79Ôćĺ	agentOrchestrator, err := agentpkg.NewOrchestrator(pgStore, llmConfig, os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"))
    80Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    81Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("agent orchestrator not available ÔÇö agent jobs will not be processed", "err", err)
    82Ôćĺ	} else {
    83Ôćĺ		agentWorker := agentpkg.NewAgentWorker(agentOrchestrator, pgStore)
    84Ôćĺ		river.AddWorker(workers, agentWorker)
    85Ôćĺ		slog.Info("agent worker registered")
    86Ôćĺ	}
    87Ôćĺ
    88Ôćĺ	// Scan worker: requires LLM for dependency extraction
    89Ôćĺ	scanScanner := onboard.NewScanner(http.DefaultClient, "", "")
    90Ôćĺ	var scanExtractor *onboard.DependencyExtractor
    91Ôćĺ	extractorCfg := onboard.ExtractorConfig{
    92Ôćĺ		Provider:      llmConfig.Provider,
    93Ôćĺ		Model:         llmConfig.Model,
    94Ôćĺ		GoogleAPIKey:  llmConfig.GoogleAPIKey,
    95Ôćĺ		OpenAIAPIKey:  llmConfig.OpenAIAPIKey,
    96Ôćĺ		OpenAIBaseURL: llmConfig.OpenAIBaseURL,
    97Ôćĺ	}
    98Ôćĺ	ext, err := onboard.NewDependencyExtractor(ctx, extractorCfg)
    99Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   100Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("dependency extractor not available", "err", err)
   101Ôćĺ	} else {
   102Ôćĺ		scanExtractor = ext
   103Ôćĺ	}
   104Ôćĺ	scanWorker := onboard.NewScanWorker(pgStore, scanScanner, scanExtractor, pool)
   105Ôćĺ	river.AddWorker(workers, scanWorker)
   106Ôćĺ	slog.Info("scan worker registered")
   107Ôćĺ
   108Ôćĺ	riverClient, err := queue.NewRiverClient(pool, workers)
   109Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   110Ôćĺ		slog.Error("river client failed", "err", err)
   111Ôćĺ		os.Exit(1)
   112Ôćĺ	}
   113Ôćĺ
   114Ôćĺ	// Now that the river client exists, set it on the existing pgStore so that
   115Ôćĺ	// all holders (including NotifyWorker) can enqueue agent jobs.
   116Ôćĺ	pgStore.SetRiverClient(riverClient)
   117Ôćĺ
   118Ôćĺ	if err := riverClient.Start(ctx); err != nil {
   119Ôćĺ		slog.Error("river start failed", "err", err)
   120Ôćĺ		os.Exit(1)
   121Ôćĺ	}
   122Ôćĺ
   123Ôćĺ	// Ingestion layer
   124Ôćĺ	ingestionStore := ingestion.NewPgStore(pool, riverClient)
   125Ôćĺ	svc := ingestion.NewService(ingestionStore)
   126Ôćĺ
   127Ôćĺ	loader := ingestion.NewSourceLoader(pool, http.DefaultClient)
   128Ôćĺ	orch := ingestion.NewOrchestrator(svc, loader, pool, 5*time.Minute)
   129Ôćĺ
   130Ôćĺ	broadcaster := api.NewBroadcaster()
   131Ôćĺ
   132Ôćĺ	mux := http.NewServeMux()
   133Ôćĺ
   134Ôćĺ	// Serve frontend static export if available
   135Ôćĺ	if info, err := os.Stat("web/out"); err == nil && info.IsDir() {
   136Ôćĺ		api.RegisterFrontend(mux, "web/out")
   137Ôćĺ		slog.Info("serving frontend from web/out")
   138Ôćĺ	}
   139Ôćĺ
   140Ôćĺ	// Register all API v1 routes
   141Ôćĺ	api.RegisterRoutes(mux, api.Dependencies{
   142Ôćĺ		DB:                    pool,
   143Ôćĺ		ProjectsStore:         pgStore,
   144Ôćĺ		ReleasesStore:         pgStore,
   145Ôćĺ		SubscriptionsStore:    pgStore,
   146Ôćĺ		SourcesStore:          pgStore,
   147Ôćĺ		ChannelsStore:         pgStore,
   148Ôćĺ		ContextSourcesStore:   pgStore,
   149Ôćĺ		SemanticReleasesStore: pgStore,
   150Ôćĺ		AgentStore:            pgStore,
   151Ôćĺ		TodosStore:            pgStore,
   152Ôćĺ		OnboardStore:          pgStore,
   153Ôćĺ		PublicURL:             os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"),
   154Ôćĺ		KeyStore:              pgStore,
   155Ôćĺ		HealthChecker:         pgStore,
   156Ôćĺ		Broadcaster:           broadcaster,
   157Ôćĺ		NoAuth:                noAuth,
   158Ôćĺ		IngestionService:      svc,
   159Ôćĺ		HTTPClient:            http.DefaultClient,
   160Ôćĺ	})
   161Ôćĺ
   162Ôćĺ	srv := &http.Server{Addr: addr, Handler: api.CORS(mux)}
   163Ôćĺ
   164Ôćĺ	// Start polling in background
   165Ôćĺ	go orch.Run(ctx)
   166Ôćĺ
   167Ôćĺ	// Start PostgreSQL LISTEN/NOTIFY Ôćĺ SSE bridge
   168Ôćĺ	go api.ListenForNotifications(ctx, pool, broadcaster)
   169Ôćĺ
   170Ôćĺ	// Start HTTP server
   171Ôćĺ	go func() {
   172Ôćĺ		slog.Info("server starting", "addr", srv.Addr)
   173Ôćĺ		if err := srv.ListenAndServe(); err != http.ErrServerClosed {
   174Ôćĺ			slog.Error("server error", "err", err)
   175Ôćĺ		}
   176Ôćĺ	}()
   177Ôćĺ
   178Ôćĺ	<-ctx.Done()
   179Ôćĺ	slog.Info("shutting down")
   180Ôćĺ
   181Ôćĺ	shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)
   182Ôćĺ	defer cancel()
   183Ôćĺ	riverClient.Stop(shutdownCtx)
   184Ôćĺ	srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
   185Ôćĺ}
   186Ôćĺ
   187Ôćĺfunc envOr(key, fallback string) string {
   188Ôćĺ	if v := os.Getenv(key); v != "" {
   189Ôćĺ		return v
   190Ôćĺ	}
   191Ôćĺ	return fallback
   192Ôćĺ}
   193Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ.PHONY: up down db-reset build run dev test vet lint \
     2Ôćĺ        frontend-install frontend-dev frontend-build \
     3Ôćĺ        integration-test agent-dev clean
     4Ôćĺ
     5Ôćĺ# --- Configuration ---
     6ÔćĺDATABASE_URL ?= postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/changelogue?sslmode=disable
     7ÔćĺLISTEN_ADDR  ?= :8080
     8ÔćĺBINARY       := changelogue
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺ# --- Infrastructure ---
    11Ôćĺup:
    12Ôćĺ	docker compose up -d
    13Ôćĺ	@echo "Waiting for Postgres to be healthy..."
    14Ôćĺ	@until docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U postgres >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done
    15Ôćĺ	@echo "Postgres is ready."
    16Ôćĺ
    17Ôćĺdown:
    18Ôćĺ	docker compose down
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺdb-reset:
    21Ôćĺ	docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS changelogue;"
    22Ôćĺ	docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE changelogue;"
    23Ôćĺ	@echo "Database reset."
    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺ# --- Backend ---
    26Ôćĺbuild:

    10Ôćĺ// NewPool creates a PostgreSQL connection pool and verifies connectivity.
    11Ôćĺfunc NewPool(ctx context.Context, databaseURL string) (*pgxpool.Pool, error) {
    12Ôćĺ	pool, err := pgxpool.New(ctx, databaseURL)

    14Ôćĺ		return nil, fmt.Errorf("create pool: %w", err)
    15Ôćĺ	}

    17Ôćĺ		pool.Close()
    18Ôćĺ		return nil, fmt.Errorf("ping: %w", err)
    19Ôćĺ	}
    20Ôćĺ	return pool, nil
    21Ôćĺ}

1Ôćĺpackage api
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport (
     4Ôćĺ	"net/http"
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺ	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
     7Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion"
     8Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing"
     9Ôćĺ)
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺ// Dependencies holds all external dependencies required for registering API routes.
    12Ôćĺtype Dependencies struct {
    13Ôćĺ	DB                    *pgxpool.Pool
    14Ôćĺ	ProjectsStore         ProjectsStore
    15Ôćĺ	ReleasesStore         ReleasesStore
    16Ôćĺ	SubscriptionsStore    SubscriptionsStore
    17Ôćĺ	SourcesStore          SourcesStore
    18Ôćĺ	ChannelsStore         ChannelsStore
    19Ôćĺ	ContextSourcesStore   ContextSourcesStore
    20Ôćĺ	SemanticReleasesStore SemanticReleasesStore
    21Ôćĺ	AgentStore            AgentStore
    22Ôćĺ	TodosStore            TodosStore
    23Ôćĺ	OnboardStore          OnboardStore
    24Ôćĺ	PublicURL             string
    25Ôćĺ	KeyStore              KeyStore
    26Ôćĺ	HealthChecker         HealthChecker
    27Ôćĺ	Broadcaster           *Broadcaster
    28Ôćĺ	NoAuth                bool
    29Ôćĺ	IngestionService      *ingestion.Service
    30Ôćĺ	HTTPClient            *http.Client
    31Ôćĺ}
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺ// RegisterRoutes registers all API v1 routes on the given ServeMux.
    34Ôćĺfunc RegisterRoutes(mux *http.ServeMux, deps Dependencies) {
    35Ôćĺ	// Public chain: no auth required.
    36Ôćĺ	publicChain := Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery)
    37Ôćĺ
    38Ôćĺ	// Authenticated chain: includes auth unless NoAuth is set.
    39Ôćĺ	chain := publicChain
    40Ôćĺ	if !deps.NoAuth {
    41Ôćĺ		chain = Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery, RateLimit(10, 20), Auth(deps.KeyStore))
    42Ôćĺ	}
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺ	// Projects (CRUD)
    45Ôćĺ	projects := NewProjectsHandler(deps.ProjectsStore)
    46Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.List)))
    47Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Create)))
    48Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Get)))
    49Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Update)))
    50Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Delete)))
    51Ôćĺ
    52Ôćĺ	// Sources (nested under projects)
    53Ôćĺ	sources := NewSourcesHandler(deps.SourcesStore, deps.IngestionService, deps.HTTPClient)
    54Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.List)))
    55Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Create)))
    56Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Get)))
    57Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Update)))
    58Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Delete)))
    59Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/sources/{id}/poll", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.FetchReleases)))
    60Ôćĺ
    61Ôćĺ	// Context Sources (nested under projects)
    62Ôćĺ	contextSources := NewContextSourcesHandler(deps.ContextSourcesStore)
    63Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.List)))
    64Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Create)))
    65Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Get)))
    66Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Update)))
    67Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Delete)))
    68Ôćĺ
    69Ôćĺ	// Releases (read-only, nested under sources and projects)
    70Ôćĺ	releases := NewReleasesHandler(deps.ReleasesStore)
    71Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.List)))
    72Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListBySource)))
    73Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListByProject)))
    74Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.Get)))
    75Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺ	// Semantic Releases (nested under projects + top-level list)
    77Ôćĺ	semanticReleases := NewSemanticReleasesHandler(deps.SemanticReleasesStore)
    78Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListAll)))
    79Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.List)))
    80Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Get)))
    81Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListSources)))
    82Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Delete)))
    83Ôćĺ
    84Ôćĺ	// Subscriptions (CRUD)
    85Ôćĺ	subscriptions := NewSubscriptionsHandler(deps.SubscriptionsStore)
    86Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.List)))
    87Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Create)))
    88Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions/batch", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.BatchCreate)))
    89Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/batch", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.BatchDelete)))
    90Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Get)))
    91Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Update)))
    92Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Delete)))
    93Ôćĺ
    94Ôćĺ	// Channels (CRUD + test)
    95Ôćĺ	channels := NewChannelsHandler(deps.ChannelsStore, routing.NewSenders(), deps.PublicURL)
    96Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.List)))
    97Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Create)))
    98Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Get)))
    99Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Update)))
   100Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Delete)))
   101Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/channels/{id}/test", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Test)))
   102Ôćĺ
   103Ôćĺ	// Agent
   104Ôćĺ	agent := NewAgentHandler(deps.AgentStore)
   105Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/run", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.TriggerRun)))
   106Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/runs", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.ListRuns)))
   107Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/agent-runs/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.GetRun)))
   108Ôćĺ
   109Ôćĺ	// Todos
   110Ôćĺ	todos := NewTodosHandler(deps.TodosStore, deps.PublicURL)
   111Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.List)))
   112Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Get)))
   113Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/acknowledge", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Acknowledge)))
   114Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/resolve", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Resolve)))
   115Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/reopen", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Reopen)))
   116Ôćĺ	// One-click endpoints for notification links (GET so they work as <a href>)
   117Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}/acknowledge", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Acknowledge)))
   118Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}/resolve", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Resolve)))
   119Ôćĺ
   120Ôćĺ	// Onboard (repo dependency scanning)
   121Ôćĺ	ob := NewOnboardHandler(deps.OnboardStore)
   122Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/onboard/scan", chain(http.HandlerFunc(ob.Scan)))
   123Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/onboard/scans/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(ob.GetScan)))
   124Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/onboard/scans/{id}/apply", chain(http.HandlerFunc(ob.Apply)))
   125Ôćĺ
   126Ôćĺ	// Providers (metadata ÔÇö static, no store needed)
   127Ôćĺ	providers := NewProvidersHandler()

1Ôćĺpackage api
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport (
     4Ôćĺ	"context"
     5Ôćĺ	"crypto/sha256"
     6Ôćĺ	"encoding/hex"
     7Ôćĺ	"encoding/json"
     8Ôćĺ	"errors"
     9Ôćĺ	"fmt"
    10Ôćĺ	"strings"
    11Ôćĺ	"time"
    12Ôćĺ
    13Ôćĺ	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
    14Ôćĺ	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
    15Ôćĺ	"github.com/riverqueue/river"
    16Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/models"
    17Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/queue"
    18Ôćĺ)
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ// PgStore implements all store interfaces using a PostgreSQL connection pool.
    21Ôćĺtype PgStore struct {
    22Ôćĺ	pool  *pgxpool.Pool
    23Ôćĺ	river *river.Client[pgx.Tx]
    24Ôćĺ}
    25Ôćĺ
    26Ôćĺ// NewPgStore returns a new PgStore backed by the given connection pool and River client.
    27Ôćĺ// The river client may be nil if agent triggering is not needed.
    28Ôćĺfunc NewPgStore(pool *pgxpool.Pool, riverClient *river.Client[pgx.Tx]) *PgStore {
    29Ôćĺ	return &PgStore{pool: pool, river: riverClient}
    30Ôćĺ}
    31Ôćĺ
    32Ôćĺ// SetRiverClient updates the River client on an existing PgStore.
    33Ôćĺ// This is used during bootstrap to inject the client after worker registration.
    34Ôćĺfunc (s *PgStore) SetRiverClient(rc *river.Client[pgx.Tx]) {
    35Ôćĺ	s.river = rc
    36Ôćĺ}
    37Ôćĺ
    38Ôćĺ// --- ProjectsStore ---
    39Ôćĺ
    40Ôćĺfunc (s *PgStore) ListProjects(ctx context.Context, page, perPage int) ([]models.Project, int, error) {
    41Ôćĺ	var total int
    42Ôćĺ	err := s.pool.QueryRow(ctx, `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects`).Scan(&total)
    43Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    44Ôćĺ		return nil, 0, fmt.Errorf("count projects: %w", err)
    45Ôćĺ	}
    46Ôćĺ	offset := (page - 1) * perPage
    47Ôćĺ	rows, err := s.pool.Query(ctx,
    48Ôćĺ		`SELECT id, name, COALESCE(description,''), COALESCE(agent_prompt,''),
    49Ôćĺ		        COALESCE(agent_rules,'{}'), created_at, updated_at
    50Ôćĺ		 FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT $1 OFFSET $2`, perPage, offset)
    51Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    52Ôćĺ		return nil, 0, fmt.Errorf("list projects: %w", err)
    53Ôćĺ	}
    54Ôćĺ	defer rows.Close()
    55Ôćĺ	var projects []models.Project
    56Ôćĺ	for rows.Next() {
    57Ôćĺ		var p models.Project
    58Ôćĺ		if err := rows.Scan(&p.ID, &p.Name, &p.Description, &p.AgentPrompt, &p.AgentRules, &p.CreatedAt, &p.UpdatedAt); err != nil {
    59Ôćĺ			return nil, 0, fmt.Errorf("scan project: %w", err)
    60Ôćĺ		}
    61Ôćĺ		projects = append(projects, p)
    62Ôćĺ	}
    63Ôćĺ	return projects, total, nil
    64Ôćĺ}
    65Ôćĺ
    66Ôćĺfunc (s *PgStore) CreateProject(ctx context.Context, p *models.Project) error {
    67Ôćĺ	return s.pool.QueryRow(ctx,
    68Ôćĺ		`INSERT INTO projects (name, description, agent_prompt, agent_rules)
    69Ôćĺ		 VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
    70Ôćĺ		 RETURNING id, created_at, updated_at`,
    71Ôćĺ		p.Name, p.Description, p.AgentPrompt, p.AgentRules,
    72Ôćĺ	).Scan(&p.ID, &p.CreatedAt, &p.UpdatedAt)
    73Ôćĺ}
    74Ôćĺ
    75Ôćĺfunc (s *PgStore) GetProject(ctx context.Context, id string) (*models.Project, error) {
    76Ôćĺ	var p models.Project
    77Ôćĺ	err := s.pool.QueryRow(ctx,
    78Ôćĺ		`SELECT id, name, COALESCE(description,''), COALESCE(agent_prompt,''),
    79Ôćĺ		        COALESCE(agent_rules,'{}'), created_at, updated_at
    80Ôćĺ		 FROM projects WHERE id = $1`, id,
    81Ôćĺ	).Scan(&p.ID, &p.Name, &p.Description, &p.AgentPrompt, &p.AgentRules, &p.CreatedAt, &p.UpdatedAt)
    82Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    83Ôćĺ		return nil, err
    84Ôćĺ	}
    85Ôćĺ	return &p, nil
    86Ôćĺ}
    87Ôćĺ
    88Ôćĺfunc (s *PgStore) UpdateProject(ctx context.Context, id string, p *models.Project) error {
    89Ôćĺ	return s.pool.QueryRow(ctx,
    90Ôćĺ		`UPDATE projects SET name=$1, description=$2, agent_prompt=$3, agent_rules=$4, updated_at=NOW()
    91Ôćĺ		 WHERE id=$5 RETURNING updated_at`,
    92Ôćĺ		p.Name, p.Description, p.AgentPrompt, p.AgentRules, id,
    93Ôćĺ	).Scan(&p.UpdatedAt)
    94Ôćĺ}
    95Ôćĺ
    96Ôćĺfunc (s *PgStore) DeleteProject(ctx context.Context, id string) error {
    97Ôćĺ	tag, err := s.pool.Exec(ctx, `DELETE FROM projects WHERE id = $1`, id)
    98Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    99Ôćĺ		return err
   100Ôćĺ	}

    20Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    21Ôćĺ    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    22Ôćĺ);
    23Ôćĺ
    24Ôćĺ-- Configured ingestion sources (polling-based: GitHub, Docker Hub)
    25ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sources (
    26Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    27Ôćĺ    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    28Ôćĺ    provider VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    29Ôćĺ    repository VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    30Ôćĺ    poll_interval_seconds INT DEFAULT 86400,
    31Ôćĺ    enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
    32Ôćĺ    config JSONB,
    33Ôćĺ    last_polled_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    34Ôćĺ    last_error TEXT,
    35Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    36Ôćĺ    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    37Ôćĺ    UNIQUE(provider, repository)
    38Ôćĺ);
    39Ôćĺ
    40Ôćĺ-- Context sources (read-only references for agent research)
    41ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS context_sources (
    42Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    43Ôćĺ    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    44Ôćĺ    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    45Ôćĺ    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    46Ôćĺ    config JSONB NOT NULL,
    47Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    48Ôćĺ    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    49Ôćĺ);
    50Ôćĺ
    51Ôćĺ-- Source-level releases (detected from polling sources)
    52ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS releases (
    53Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    54Ôćĺ    source_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES sources(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    55Ôćĺ    version VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    56Ôćĺ    raw_data JSONB,
    57Ôćĺ    released_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    58Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    59Ôćĺ    UNIQUE(source_id, version)
    60Ôćĺ);
    61Ôćĺ
    62Ôćĺ-- Project-level semantic releases (AI-generated, correlating source releases)
    63ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS semantic_releases (
    64Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    65Ôćĺ    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    66Ôćĺ    version VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    67Ôćĺ    report JSONB,
    68Ôćĺ    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
    69Ôćĺ    error TEXT,
    70Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    71Ôćĺ    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    72Ôćĺ    UNIQUE(project_id, version)
    73Ôćĺ);
    74Ôćĺ
    75Ôćĺ-- Join table: which source releases compose a semantic release
    76ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS semantic_release_sources (
    77Ôćĺ    semantic_release_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    78Ôćĺ    release_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    79Ôćĺ    PRIMARY KEY (semantic_release_id, release_id)
    80Ôćĺ);
    81Ôćĺ
    82Ôćĺ-- Notification channels (standalone)
    83ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notification_channels (
    84Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    85Ôćĺ    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    86Ôćĺ    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    87Ôćĺ    config JSONB NOT NULL,
    88Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    89Ôćĺ    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    90Ôćĺ);
    91Ôćĺ
    92Ôćĺ-- Subscriptions: two types (source releases and semantic releases)
    93ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subscriptions (
    94Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    95Ôćĺ    channel_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES notification_channels(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    96Ôćĺ    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (type IN ('source_release', 'semantic_release')),
    97Ôćĺ    source_id UUID REFERENCES sources(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    98Ôćĺ    project_id UUID REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    99Ôćĺ    version_filter TEXT,
   100Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   101Ôćĺ    CHECK (
   102Ôćĺ        (type = 'source_release'   AND source_id  IS NOT NULL AND project_id IS NULL) OR
   103Ôćĺ        (type = 'semantic_release' AND project_id IS NOT NULL AND source_id  IS NULL)
   104Ôćĺ    )
   105Ôćĺ);
   106Ôćĺ
   107Ôćĺ-- Agent runs (scoped to project)
   108ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_runs (
   109Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   110Ôćĺ    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   111Ôćĺ    semantic_release_id UUID REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
   112Ôćĺ    trigger VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
   113Ôćĺ    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   114Ôćĺ    prompt_used TEXT,
   115Ôćĺ    error TEXT,
   116Ôćĺ    started_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   117Ôćĺ    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   118Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
   119Ôćĺ);
   120Ôćĺ
   121ÔćĺALTER TABLE agent_runs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version VARCHAR(100);
   122Ôćĺ
   123Ôćĺ-- API authentication keys
   124ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS api_keys (
   125Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   126Ôćĺ    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
   127Ôćĺ    key_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
   128Ôćĺ    key_prefix VARCHAR(12) NOT NULL,
   129Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   130Ôćĺ    last_used_at TIMESTAMPTZ
   131Ôćĺ);
   132Ôćĺ
   133Ôćĺ-- Trigger for SSE: notify on new releases
   134ÔćĺCREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION notify_release_created() RETURNS trigger AS $$
   135ÔćĺBEGIN
   136Ôćĺ    PERFORM pg_notify('release_events', json_build_object('type', 'release', 'id', NEW.id)::text);
   137Ôćĺ    RETURN NEW;
   138ÔćĺEND;
   139Ôćĺ$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
   140Ôćĺ
   141ÔćĺDROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS release_created_trigger ON releases;
   142ÔćĺCREATE TRIGGER release_created_trigger
   143Ôćĺ    AFTER INSERT ON releases
   144Ôćĺ    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION notify_release_created();
   145Ôćĺ
   146Ôćĺ-- Trigger for SSE: notify on semantic release completion
   147ÔćĺCREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION notify_semantic_release() RETURNS trigger AS $$
   148ÔćĺBEGIN
   149Ôćĺ    IF NEW.status = 'completed' AND (OLD IS NULL OR OLD.status != 'completed') THEN
   150Ôćĺ        PERFORM pg_notify('release_events', json_build_object('type', 'semantic_release', 'id', NEW.id)::text);
   151Ôćĺ    END IF;
   152Ôćĺ    RETURN NEW;
   153ÔćĺEND;
   154Ôćĺ$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
   155Ôćĺ
   156ÔćĺDROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS semantic_release_trigger ON semantic_releases;
   157ÔćĺCREATE TRIGGER semantic_release_trigger
   158Ôćĺ    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE ON semantic_releases
   159Ôćĺ    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION notify_semantic_release();
   160Ôćĺ
   161Ôćĺ-- Release TODOs (acknowledge/resolve tracking)
   162ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS release_todos (
   163Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   164Ôćĺ    release_id UUID REFERENCES releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   165Ôćĺ    semantic_release_id UUID REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   166Ôćĺ    status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   167Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   168Ôćĺ    acknowledged_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   169Ôćĺ    resolved_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   170Ôćĺ    CHECK (
   171Ôćĺ        (release_id IS NOT NULL AND semantic_release_id IS NULL) OR
   172Ôćĺ        (release_id IS NULL AND semantic_release_id IS NOT NULL)
   173Ôćĺ    )
   174Ôćĺ);
   175ÔćĺCREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_release_todos_release_id ON release_todos(release_id) WHERE release_id IS NOT NULL;
   176ÔćĺCREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_release_todos_semantic_release_id ON release_todos(semantic_release_id) WHERE semantic_release_id IS NOT NULL;
   177Ôćĺ
   178Ôćĺ-- Onboarding scans (GitHub repo dependency detection)
   179ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS onboard_scans (
   180Ôćĺ    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   181Ôćĺ    repo_url TEXT NOT NULL,
   182Ôćĺ    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   183Ôćĺ    results JSONB,
   184Ôćĺ    error TEXT,
   185Ôćĺ    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   186Ôćĺ    started_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   187Ôćĺ    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ
   188Ôćĺ);
   189Ôćĺ`
   190Ôćĺ
   191Ôćĺ// RunMigrations applies River's schema and the application schema. Idempotent ÔÇö safe to call on every startup.
   192Ôćĺfunc RunMigrations(ctx context.Context, pool *pgxpool.Pool) error {
   193Ôćĺ	migrator, err := rivermigrate.New(riverpgxv5.New(pool), nil)
   194Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   195Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("create river migrator: %w", err)
   196Ôćĺ	}
   197Ôćĺ	if _, err := migrator.Migrate(ctx, rivermigrate.DirectionUp, nil); err != nil {
   198Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("river migrations: %w", err)
   199Ôćĺ	}
   200Ôćĺ
   201Ôćĺ	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, schema); err != nil {
   202Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("app migrations: %w", err)
   203Ôćĺ	}
   204Ôćĺ
   205Ôćĺ	// Migrate existing subscription type values: sourceÔćĺsource_release, projectÔćĺsemantic_release.
   206Ôćĺ	// Drop old CHECK constraints first (both the named type check and the unnamed
   207Ôćĺ	// composite check referencing old values), then UPDATE data, then re-add constraints.
   208Ôćĺ	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   209Ôćĺ		ALTER TABLE subscriptions DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS subscriptions_type_check;
   210Ôćĺ		ALTER TABLE subscriptions DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS subscriptions_check;
   211Ôćĺ		UPDATE subscriptions SET type = 'source_release' WHERE type = 'source';
   212Ôćĺ		UPDATE subscriptions SET type = 'semantic_release' WHERE type = 'project';
   213Ôćĺ		ALTER TABLE subscriptions ADD CONSTRAINT subscriptions_type_check CHECK (type IN ('source_release', 'semantic_release'));
   214Ôćĺ		ALTER TABLE subscriptions ADD CONSTRAINT subscriptions_check CHECK (
   215Ôćĺ			(type = 'source_release'   AND source_id IS NOT NULL AND project_id IS NULL) OR
   216Ôćĺ			(type = 'semantic_release' AND project_id IS NOT NULL AND source_id IS NULL)
   217Ôćĺ		);
   218Ôćĺ	`); err != nil {
   219Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("subscription type migration: %w", err)
   220Ôćĺ	}
   221Ôćĺ
   222Ôćĺ	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   223Ôćĺ		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version_filter_include TEXT;
   224Ôćĺ		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version_filter_exclude TEXT;
   225Ôćĺ	`); err != nil {
   226Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("source version filter migration: %w", err)
   227Ôćĺ	}
   228Ôćĺ
   229Ôćĺ	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   230Ôćĺ		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS exclude_prereleases BOOLEAN DEFAULT false;
   231Ôćĺ	`); err != nil {
   232Ôćĺ		return fmt.Errorf("source exclude_prereleases migration: %w", err)
   233Ôćĺ	}
   234Ôćĺ	return nil
   235Ôćĺ}

1Ôćĺpackage main
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport (
     4Ôćĺ	"context"
     5Ôćĺ	"log/slog"
     6Ôćĺ	"net/http"
     7Ôćĺ	"os"
     8Ôćĺ	"os/signal"
     9Ôćĺ	"time"
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺ	"github.com/riverqueue/river"
    12Ôćĺ	agentpkg "github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/agent"
    13Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/api"
    14Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/db"
    15Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion"
    16Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/onboard"
    17Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/queue"
    18Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing"
    19Ôćĺ)
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺfunc main() {
    22Ôćĺ	// Configure log level from LOG_LEVEL env (debug, info, warn, error).
    23Ôćĺ	logLevel := new(slog.LevelVar) // defaults to Info
    24Ôćĺ	switch os.Getenv("LOG_LEVEL") {
    25Ôćĺ	case "debug":
    26Ôćĺ		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelDebug)
    27Ôćĺ	case "warn":
    28Ôćĺ		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelWarn)
    29Ôćĺ	case "error":
    30Ôćĺ		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelError)
    31Ôćĺ	}
    32Ôćĺ	slog.SetDefault(slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stderr, &slog.HandlerOptions{Level: logLevel})))
    33Ôćĺ
    34Ôćĺ	ctx, stop := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt)
    35Ôćĺ	defer stop()
    36Ôćĺ
    37Ôćĺ	dbURL := envOr("DATABASE_URL", "postgres://localhost:5432/changelogue?sslmode=disable")
    38Ôćĺ	addr := envOr("LISTEN_ADDR", ":8080")
    39Ôćĺ	noAuth := os.Getenv("NO_AUTH") == "true"
    40Ôćĺ
    41Ôćĺ	// Database
    42Ôćĺ	pool, err := db.NewPool(ctx, dbURL)
    43Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    44Ôćĺ		slog.Error("database connection failed", "err", err)
    45Ôćĺ		os.Exit(1)
    46Ôćĺ	}
    47Ôćĺ	defer pool.Close()
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ	if err := db.RunMigrations(ctx, pool); err != nil {
    50Ôćĺ		slog.Error("migrations failed", "err", err)
    51Ôćĺ		os.Exit(1)
    52Ôćĺ	}
    53Ôćĺ
    54Ôćĺ	// API & routing store (created before River so we can register workers)
    55Ôćĺ	// The river client is set to nil initially; TriggerAgentRun (which needs it)
    56Ôćĺ	// won't be called until the server is up and the client is set below.
    57Ôćĺ	pgStore := api.NewPgStore(pool, nil)
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ	// Register River workers
    60Ôćĺ	workers := river.NewWorkers()
    61Ôćĺ	notifyWorker := routing.NewNotifyWorker(pgStore, os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"))
    62Ôćĺ	river.AddWorker(workers, notifyWorker)
    63Ôćĺ
    64Ôćĺ	// Agent worker: requires an LLM API key. If unavailable, agent jobs
    65Ôćĺ	// will remain in the queue until the key is configured and the server
    66Ôćĺ	// is restarted.
    67Ôćĺ	llmProvider := envOr("LLM_PROVIDER", "gemini")
    68Ôćĺ	llmModelDefault := "gemini-2.5-flash"
    69Ôćĺ	if llmProvider == "openai" {
    70Ôćĺ		llmModelDefault = "gpt-5.2"
    71Ôćĺ	}
    72Ôćĺ	llmConfig := agentpkg.LLMConfig{
    73Ôćĺ		Provider:      llmProvider,
    74Ôćĺ		Model:         envOr("LLM_MODEL", llmModelDefault),
    75Ôćĺ		GoogleAPIKey:  os.Getenv("GOOGLE_API_KEY"),
    76Ôćĺ		OpenAIAPIKey:  os.Getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY"),
    77Ôćĺ		OpenAIBaseURL: os.Getenv("OPENAI_BASE_URL"),
    78Ôćĺ	}
    79Ôćĺ	agentOrchestrator, err := agentpkg.NewOrchestrator(pgStore, llmConfig, os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"))
    80Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
    81Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("agent orchestrator not available ÔÇö agent jobs will not be processed", "err", err)
    82Ôćĺ	} else {
    83Ôćĺ		agentWorker := agentpkg.NewAgentWorker(agentOrchestrator, pgStore)
    84Ôćĺ		river.AddWorker(workers, agentWorker)
    85Ôćĺ		slog.Info("agent worker registered")
    86Ôćĺ	}
    87Ôćĺ
    88Ôćĺ	// Scan worker: requires LLM for dependency extraction
    89Ôćĺ	scanScanner := onboard.NewScanner(http.DefaultClient, "", "")
    90Ôćĺ	var scanExtractor *onboard.DependencyExtractor
    91Ôćĺ	extractorCfg := onboard.ExtractorConfig{
    92Ôćĺ		Provider:      llmConfig.Provider,
    93Ôćĺ		Model:         llmConfig.Model,
    94Ôćĺ		GoogleAPIKey:  llmConfig.GoogleAPIKey,
    95Ôćĺ		OpenAIAPIKey:  llmConfig.OpenAIAPIKey,
    96Ôćĺ		OpenAIBaseURL: llmConfig.OpenAIBaseURL,
    97Ôćĺ	}
    98Ôćĺ	ext, err := onboard.NewDependencyExtractor(ctx, extractorCfg)
    99Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   100Ôćĺ		slog.Warn("dependency extractor not available", "err", err)
   101Ôćĺ	} else {
   102Ôćĺ		scanExtractor = ext
   103Ôćĺ	}
   104Ôćĺ	scanWorker := onboard.NewScanWorker(pgStore, scanScanner, scanExtractor, pool)
   105Ôćĺ	river.AddWorker(workers, scanWorker)
   106Ôćĺ	slog.Info("scan worker registered")
   107Ôćĺ
   108Ôćĺ	riverClient, err := queue.NewRiverClient(pool, workers)
   109Ôćĺ	if err != nil {
   110Ôćĺ		slog.Error("river client failed", "err", err)
   111Ôćĺ		os.Exit(1)
   112Ôćĺ	}
   113Ôćĺ
   114Ôćĺ	// Now that the river client exists, set it on the existing pgStore so that
   115Ôćĺ	// all holders (including NotifyWorker) can enqueue agent jobs.
   116Ôćĺ	pgStore.SetRiverClient(riverClient)
   117Ôćĺ
   118Ôćĺ	if err := riverClient.Start(ctx); err != nil {
   119Ôćĺ		slog.Error("river start failed", "err", err)
   120Ôćĺ		os.Exit(1)
   121Ôćĺ	}
   122Ôćĺ
   123Ôćĺ	// Ingestion layer
   124Ôćĺ	ingestionStore := ingestion.NewPgStore(pool, riverClient)
   125Ôćĺ	svc := ingestion.NewService(ingestionStore)
   126Ôćĺ
   127Ôćĺ	loader := ingestion.NewSourceLoader(pool, http.DefaultClient)
   128Ôćĺ	orch := ingestion.NewOrchestrator(svc, loader, pool, 5*time.Minute)
   129Ôćĺ
   130Ôćĺ	broadcaster := api.NewBroadcaster()
   131Ôćĺ
   132Ôćĺ	mux := http.NewServeMux()
   133Ôćĺ
   134Ôćĺ	// Serve frontend static export if available
   135Ôćĺ	if info, err := os.Stat("web/out"); err == nil && info.IsDir() {
   136Ôćĺ		api.RegisterFrontend(mux, "web/out")
   137Ôćĺ		slog.Info("serving frontend from web/out")
   138Ôćĺ	}
   139Ôćĺ
   140Ôćĺ	// Register all API v1 routes
   141Ôćĺ	api.RegisterRoutes(mux, api.Dependencies{
   142Ôćĺ		DB:                    pool,
   143Ôćĺ		ProjectsStore:         pgStore,
   144Ôćĺ		ReleasesStore:         pgStore,
   145Ôćĺ		SubscriptionsStore:    pgStore,
   146Ôćĺ		SourcesStore:          pgStore,
   147Ôćĺ		ChannelsStore:         pgStore,
   148Ôćĺ		ContextSourcesStore:   pgStore,
   149Ôćĺ		SemanticReleasesStore: pgStore,
   150Ôćĺ		AgentStore:            pgStore,
   151Ôćĺ		TodosStore:            pgStore,
   152Ôćĺ		OnboardStore:          pgStore,
   153Ôćĺ		PublicURL:             os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"),
   154Ôćĺ		KeyStore:              pgStore,
   155Ôćĺ		HealthChecker:         pgStore,
   156Ôćĺ		Broadcaster:           broadcaster,
   157Ôćĺ		NoAuth:                noAuth,
   158Ôćĺ		IngestionService:      svc,
   159Ôćĺ		HTTPClient:            http.DefaultClient,
   160Ôćĺ	})
   161Ôćĺ
   162Ôćĺ	srv := &http.Server{Addr: addr, Handler: api.CORS(mux)}
   163Ôćĺ
   164Ôćĺ	// Start polling in background
   165Ôćĺ	go orch.Run(ctx)
   166Ôćĺ
   167Ôćĺ	// Start PostgreSQL LISTEN/NOTIFY Ôćĺ SSE bridge
   168Ôćĺ	go api.ListenForNotifications(ctx, pool, broadcaster)
   169Ôćĺ
   170Ôćĺ	// Start HTTP server
   171Ôćĺ	go func() {
   172Ôćĺ		slog.Info("server starting", "addr", srv.Addr)
   173Ôćĺ		if err := srv.ListenAndServe(); err != http.ErrServerClosed {
   174Ôćĺ			slog.Error("server error", "err", err)
   175Ôćĺ		}
   176Ôćĺ	}()
   177Ôćĺ
   178Ôćĺ	<-ctx.Done()
   179Ôćĺ	slog.Info("shutting down")
   180Ôćĺ
   181Ôćĺ	shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)
   182Ôćĺ	defer cancel()
   183Ôćĺ	riverClient.Stop(shutdownCtx)
   184Ôćĺ	srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
   185Ôćĺ}
   186Ôćĺ
   187Ôćĺfunc envOr(key, fallback string) string {
   188Ôćĺ	if v := os.Getenv(key); v != "" {
   189Ôćĺ		return v
   190Ôćĺ	}
   191Ôćĺ	return fallback
   192Ôćĺ}

package api

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion"
	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing"
)

// Dependencies holds all external dependencies required for registering API routes.
type Dependencies struct {
	DB                    *pgxpool.Pool
	ProjectsStore         ProjectsStore
	ReleasesStore         ReleasesStore
	SubscriptionsStore    SubscriptionsStore
	SourcesStore          SourcesStore
	ChannelsStore         ChannelsStore
	ContextSourcesStore   ContextSourcesStore
	SemanticReleasesStore SemanticReleasesStore
	AgentStore            AgentStore
	TodosStore            TodosStore
	OnboardStore          OnboardStore
	PublicURL             string
	KeyStore              KeyStore
	HealthChecker         HealthChecker
	Broadcaster           *Broadcaster
	NoAuth                bool
	IngestionService      *ingestion.Service
	HTTPClient            *http.Client
}

// RegisterRoutes registers all API v1 routes on the given ServeMux.
func RegisterRoutes(mux *http.ServeMux, deps Dependencies) {
	// Public chain: no auth required.
	publicChain := Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery)

	// Authenticated chain: includes auth unless NoAuth is set.
	chain := publicChain
	if !deps.NoAuth {
		chain = Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery, RateLimit(10, 20), Auth(deps.KeyStore))
	}

	// Projects (CRUD)
	projects := NewProjectsHandler(deps.ProjectsStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Delete)))

	// Sources (nested under projects)
	sources := NewSourcesHandler(deps.SourcesStore, deps.IngestionService, deps.HTTPClient)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Delete)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/sources/{id}/poll", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.FetchReleases)))

	// Context Sources (nested under projects)
	contextSources := NewContextSourcesHandler(deps.ContextSourcesStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Delete)))

	// Releases (read-only, nested under sources and projects)
	releases := NewReleasesHandler(deps.ReleasesStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.List)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListBySource)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListByProject)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.Get)))

	// Semantic Releases (nested under projects + top-level list)
	semanticReleases := NewSemanticReleasesHandler(deps.SemanticReleasesStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListAll)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.List)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Get)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListSources)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Delete)))

	// Subscriptions (CRUD)
	subscriptions := NewSubscriptionsHandler(deps.SubscriptionsStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Create)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions/batch", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.BatchCreate)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/batch", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.BatchDelete)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Delete)))

	// Channels (CRUD + test)
	channels := NewChannelsHandler(deps.ChannelsStore, routing.NewSenders(), deps.PublicURL)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Delete)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/channels/{id}/test", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Test)))

	// Agent
	agent := NewAgentHandler(deps.AgentStore)
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/run", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.TriggerRun)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/runs", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.ListRuns)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/agent-runs/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.GetRun)))

	// Todos
	todos := NewTodosHandler(deps.TodosStore, deps.PublicURL)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.List)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/acknowledge", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Acknowledge)))
	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/resolve", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Resolve)))
	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/reopen", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Reopen)))
	// One-click endpoints for notification links (GET so they work as <a href>)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}/acknowledge", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Acknowledge)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}/resolve", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Resolve)))

	// Onboard (repo dependency scanning)
	ob := NewOnboardHandler(deps.OnboardStore)
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/onboard/scan", chain(http.HandlerFunc(ob.Scan)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/onboard/scans/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(ob.GetScan)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/onboard/scans/{id}/apply", chain(http.HandlerFunc(ob.Apply)))

	// Providers (metadata ÔÇö static, no store needed)
	providers := NewProvidersHandler()
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/providers", chain(http.HandlerFunc(providers.List)))

	// Discovery (public ÔÇö no auth, proxies external APIs)
	discover := NewDiscoverHandler(deps.HTTPClient, "", "")
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/discover/github", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(discover.GitHub)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/discover/dockerhub", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(discover.DockerHub)))

	// SSE events
	events := NewEventsHandler(deps.Broadcaster)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/events", chain(http.HandlerFunc(events.Stream)))

	// Health (public ÔÇö no auth middleware)
	health := NewHealthHandler(deps.HealthChecker)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/health", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Check)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/stats", chain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Stats)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/stats/trend", chain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Trend)))
}

content.content:
1Ôćĺ# GitHub OAuth Login Design
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺ## Overview
     4Ôćĺ
     5ÔćĺAdd GitHub OAuth login to Changelogue with server-side sessions, restricted to an allowlist of GitHub usernames and/or org memberships. Existing API key auth for machine clients is preserved ÔÇö both auth methods coexist.
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺ## OAuth Flow
     8Ôćĺ
     9Ôćĺ### Routes
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺ| Route | Auth | Purpose |
    12Ôćĺ|-------|------|---------|
    13Ôćĺ| `GET /auth/github` | None | Redirect to GitHub OAuth authorize URL |
    14Ôćĺ| `GET /auth/github/callback` | None | Receive code, exchange for token, validate user, create session |
    15Ôćĺ| `GET /auth/me` | Session | Return current user info |
    16Ôćĺ| `POST /auth/logout` | Session | Delete session, clear cookie |
    17Ôćĺ
    18Ôćĺ### Flow
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ1. Frontend redirects to `/auth/github`
    21Ôćĺ2. Backend generates random `state`, stores in memory (10-min TTL, max 1000 entries), redirects to `https://github.com/login/oauth/authorize?client_id=...&state=...&scope=read:org`
    22Ôćĺ3. GitHub redirects to `/auth/github/callback?code=...&state=...`
    23Ôćĺ4. Backend validates `state`, exchanges `code` for access token via `https://github.com/login/oauth/access_token`
    24Ôćĺ5. Fetches `https://api.github.com/user` and `https://api.github.com/user/orgs` using the access token
    25Ôćĺ6. **Access token is discarded** after fetching user info ÔÇö it is not stored. Org membership is checked at login time only.
    26Ôćĺ7. Checks username against `ALLOWED_GITHUB_USERS` and org logins against `ALLOWED_GITHUB_ORGS`
    27Ôćĺ8. If allowed: upsert user, create session, set HttpOnly cookie, redirect to `/`
    28Ôćĺ9. If denied: redirect to `/login?error=unauthorized`
    29Ôćĺ
    30Ôćĺ**Logging**: Log successful logins (`slog.Info`) and denied logins (`slog.Warn`) with username and reason.
    31Ôćĺ
    32Ôćĺ### Environment Variables
    33Ôćĺ
    34Ôćĺ| Variable | Required | Purpose |
    35Ôćĺ|----------|----------|---------|
    36Ôćĺ| `GITHUB_CLIENT_ID` | Prod | GitHub OAuth App client ID |
    37Ôćĺ| `GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET` | Prod | GitHub OAuth App client secret |
    38Ôćĺ| `ALLOWED_GITHUB_USERS` | No | Comma-separated GitHub usernames |
    39Ôćĺ| `ALLOWED_GITHUB_ORGS` | No | Comma-separated GitHub org logins |
    40Ôćĺ| `SESSION_SECRET` | Prod | Secret for HMAC-signing session cookie values |
    41Ôćĺ
    42Ôćĺ**Startup validation**: If `NO_AUTH` is not `true`, the server must refuse to start if both `ALLOWED_GITHUB_USERS` and `ALLOWED_GITHUB_ORGS` are empty. Log error and `os.Exit(1)`, consistent with existing startup failure patterns.
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺ**Note on allowlists**: If a user changes their GitHub username after being added to `ALLOWED_GITHUB_USERS`, they lose access. This is expected ÔÇö update the allowlist accordingly.
    45Ôćĺ
    46Ôćĺ## Cookie Format
    47Ôćĺ
    48ÔćĺThe session cookie value is `sessionID.hmacSignature`:
    49Ôćĺ- `sessionID` is the UUID from the `sessions` table
    50Ôćĺ- `hmacSignature` is `HMAC-SHA256(sessionID, SESSION_SECRET)`, hex-encoded
    51Ôćĺ- On validation: split cookie value at `.`, verify HMAC, then look up session in DB
    52Ôćĺ- This prevents session ID forgery even if an attacker can guess UUIDs
    53Ôćĺ
    54ÔćĺCookie settings:
    55Ôćĺ| Setting | Value |
    56Ôćĺ|---------|-------|
    57Ôćĺ| Name | `session` |
    58Ôćĺ| HttpOnly | `true` |
    59Ôćĺ| Secure | `true` by default; set `SECURE_COOKIES=false` for local dev |
    60Ôćĺ| SameSite | `Lax` |
    61Ôćĺ| Path | `/` |
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ**CSRF note**: `SameSite=Lax` prevents cookies from being sent on cross-origin POST requests, providing CSRF protection for the logout endpoint without needing a separate CSRF token.
    64Ôćĺ
    65Ôćĺ## Database Schema
    66Ôćĺ
    67ÔćĺTwo new tables added to `internal/db/migrations.go`:
    68Ôćĺ
    69Ôćĺ```sql
    70ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
    71Ôćĺ    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    72Ôćĺ    github_id       BIGINT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    73Ôćĺ    github_login    VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    74Ôćĺ    name            VARCHAR(200),
    75Ôćĺ    avatar_url      TEXT,
    76Ôćĺ    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    77Ôćĺ    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    78Ôćĺ);
    79Ôćĺ
    80ÔćĺCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sessions (
    81Ôćĺ    id          UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    82Ôćĺ    user_id     UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    83Ôćĺ    expires_at  TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    84Ôćĺ    created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    85Ôćĺ);
    86ÔćĺCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sessions_user_id ON sessions(user_id);
    87ÔćĺCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sessions_expires_at ON sessions(expires_at);
    88Ôćĺ```
    89Ôćĺ
    90Ôćĺ- Users are upserted on each login (updates login, name, avatar_url, updated_at)
    91Ôćĺ- Sessions expire after 7 days, no sliding window ÔÇö user re-authenticates after expiry
    92Ôćĺ- When a session expires mid-use, the next API call returns 401 and the frontend redirects to `/login`
    93Ôćĺ- Deleting a user cascades to their sessions
    94Ôćĺ
    95Ôćĺ### Future extensibility
    96Ôćĺ
    97Ôćĺ- Email/password: add `email`, `password_hash` columns to `users`
    98Ôćĺ- Google OAuth: add `google_id` column, new `/auth/google` routes
    99Ôćĺ- Multi-provider linking: add `user_identities(user_id, provider, provider_id, email)` table
   100Ôćĺ- Org-based access control: add `organizations` and `org_members` tables
   101Ôćĺ- None of these require changing the session or cookie mechanism
   102Ôćĺ
   103Ôćĺ## Backend Package: `internal/auth/`
   104Ôćĺ
   105Ôćĺ| File | Responsibility |
   106Ôćĺ|------|----------------|
   107Ôćĺ| `oauth.go` | GitHub OAuth: authorize redirect, callback, token exchange, user info fetch |
   108Ôćĺ| `session.go` | Session CRUD: create, validate (verify HMAC + DB lookup), delete, cleanup expired |
   109Ôćĺ| `middleware.go` | `RequireSession` middleware: check cookie, load user, inject into context |
   110Ôćĺ| `allowlist.go` | Parse env vars, check username/org membership, startup validation |
   111Ôćĺ
   112Ôćĺ### Auth middleware integration
   113Ôćĺ
   114ÔćĺThe existing `Auth` middleware in `internal/api/auth.go` is modified to check two auth methods in order:
   115Ôćĺ
   116Ôćĺ1. **Bearer token** (existing): If `Authorization: Bearer ...` header is present, validate via `KeyStore.ValidateKey()`. If invalid, return 401.
   117Ôćĺ2. **Session cookie** (new): If no Bearer header, check for `session` cookie. Parse and verify HMAC signature, look up session in DB via a new `SessionStore` interface, load user. If invalid/expired, return 401.
   118Ôćĺ3. If neither is present, return 401.
   119Ôćĺ
   120Ôćĺ**`SessionStore` interface** (implemented by `internal/auth/session.go`):
   121Ôćĺ```go
   122Ôćĺtype SessionStore interface {
   123Ôćĺ    ValidateSession(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*User, error)
   124Ôćĺ}
   125Ôćĺ```
   126Ôćĺ
   127Ôćĺ**Context key**: Authenticated user is stored in request context using `type contextKey string` with key `"user"`. API handlers access it via `auth.UserFromContext(ctx)` which returns `*auth.User` or nil.
   128Ôćĺ
   129Ôćĺ**`Auth` function signature** changes from `Auth(store KeyStore)` to `Auth(keys KeyStore, sessions SessionStore)`.
   130Ôćĺ
   131ÔćĺRoute auth mapping:
   132Ôćĺ
   133Ôćĺ```
   134Ôćĺ/auth/github          Ôćĺ no auth (public)
   135Ôćĺ/auth/github/callback Ôćĺ no auth (public)
   136Ôćĺ/auth/me              Ôćĺ session cookie only (uses RequireSession)
   137Ôćĺ/auth/logout          Ôćĺ session cookie only (uses RequireSession)
   138Ôćĺ/api/v1/health        Ôćĺ no auth (existing)
   139Ôćĺ/api/v1/*             Ôćĺ API key OR session cookie (uses modified Auth)
   140Ôćĺ```
   141Ôćĺ
   142Ôćĺ## Frontend Changes
   143Ôćĺ
   144Ôćĺ### New files
   145Ôćĺ
   146Ôćĺ| File | Purpose |
   147Ôćĺ|------|---------|
   148Ôćĺ| `web/app/login/page.tsx` | Login page: app logo, "Sign in with GitHub" button, error display |
   149Ôćĺ| `web/lib/auth/context.tsx` | `AuthProvider` + `useAuth()` hook |
   150Ôćĺ
   151Ôćĺ### Auth context
   152Ôćĺ
   153Ôćĺ```
   154ÔćĺAuthProvider
   155Ôćĺ  Ôćĺ on mount: fetch /auth/me
   156Ôćĺ  Ôćĺ if 200: set user state, render children
   157Ôćĺ  Ôćĺ if 401 AND pathname is not /login: redirect to /login
   158Ôćĺ  Ôćĺ if on /login: render login page without redirect
   159Ôćĺ  Ôćĺ shows loading state while checking
   160Ôćĺ```
   161Ôćĺ
   162ÔćĺThe `/login` page is excluded from the auth redirect loop ÔÇö `AuthProvider` checks `window.location.pathname` before redirecting.
   163Ôćĺ
   164Ôćĺ### Layout changes (`web/app/layout.tsx`)
   165Ôćĺ
   166Ôćĺ- Wrap app in `AuthProvider`
   167Ôćĺ- Unauthenticated users are redirected to `/login` (except when already on `/login`)
   168Ôćĺ
   169Ôćĺ### Sidebar changes
   170Ôćĺ
   171Ôćĺ- Add user avatar + dropdown with "Sign out" option
   172Ôćĺ- Sign out POSTs to `/auth/logout`, redirects to `/login`
   173Ôćĺ
   174Ôćĺ### No changes to API client
   175Ôćĺ
   176Ôćĺ`web/lib/api/client.ts` uses `fetch()` which automatically sends `HttpOnly` cookies with same-origin requests. No Authorization header needed for session-based auth.
   177Ôćĺ
   178Ôćĺ## Development & NO_AUTH Mode
   179Ôćĺ
   180ÔćĺWhen `NO_AUTH=true`:
   181Ôćĺ- API key auth bypass continues (existing)
   182Ôćĺ- Session auth middleware bypasses ÔÇö injects a fake dev user
   183Ôćĺ- `/auth/me` returns a hardcoded dev user
   184Ôćĺ- No `GITHUB_CLIENT_ID` / `GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET` needed
   185Ôćĺ- Login page accessible but not required
   186Ôćĺ- Startup validation for allowlists is skipped
   187Ôćĺ
   188Ôćĺ## Session Cleanup
   189Ôćĺ
   190ÔćĺA background goroutine runs hourly to delete expired sessions (`expires_at < NOW()`). Starts alongside the existing polling engine in `cmd/server/main.go`. Respects context cancellation for clean shutdown, using `time.Ticker`.
   191Ôćĺ
   192Ôćĺ## State Parameter Storage
   193Ôćĺ
   194ÔćĺOAuth `state` values stored in an in-memory `sync.Map` with:
   195Ôćĺ- 10-minute TTL per entry
   196Ôćĺ- Maximum 1000 pending states (rejects new `/auth/github` requests with 429 if full)
   197Ôćĺ- Cleanup goroutine sweeps expired entries every 5 minutes
   198Ôćĺ- Sufficient for single-instance deployment; can be moved to PostgreSQL if multi-instance is needed later
   199Ôćĺ

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

Frontend gets an `AuthProvider` context that redirects unauthenticated users to a login page.

    20Ôćĺ| `internal/auth/user.go` | `User` struct, context helpers (`UserFromContext`, `WithUser`) |
    21Ôćĺ| `internal/auth/session.go` | `SessionStore` interface, session create/validate/delete/cleanup, HMAC cookie signing |
    22Ôćĺ| `internal/auth/allowlist.go` | Parse env vars, check username/org membership, startup validation |
    23Ôćĺ| `internal/auth/oauth.go` | GitHub OAuth handlers: authorize redirect, callback, `/auth/me`, `/auth/logout` |
    24Ôćĺ| `internal/auth/state.go` | In-memory OAuth state parameter store with TTL and size limit |

...

1Ôćĺpackage api
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺimport (
     4Ôćĺ	"net/http"
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺ	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
     7Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion"
     8Ôćĺ	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing"
     9Ôćĺ)
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺ// Dependencies holds all external dependencies required for registering API routes.
    12Ôćĺtype Dependencies struct {
    13Ôćĺ	DB                    *pgxpool.Pool
    14Ôćĺ	ProjectsStore         ProjectsStore
    15Ôćĺ	ReleasesStore         ReleasesStore
    16Ôćĺ	SubscriptionsStore    SubscriptionsStore
    17Ôćĺ	SourcesStore          SourcesStore
    18Ôćĺ	ChannelsStore         ChannelsStore
    19Ôćĺ	ContextSourcesStore   ContextSourcesStore
    20Ôćĺ	SemanticReleasesStore SemanticReleasesStore
    21Ôćĺ	AgentStore            AgentStore
    22Ôćĺ	TodosStore            TodosStore
    23Ôćĺ	OnboardStore          OnboardStore
    24Ôćĺ	PublicURL             string
    25Ôćĺ	KeyStore              KeyStore
    26Ôćĺ	HealthChecker         HealthChecker
    27Ôćĺ	Broadcaster           *Broadcaster
    28Ôćĺ	NoAuth                bool
    29Ôćĺ	IngestionService      *ingestion.Service
    30Ôćĺ	HTTPClient            *http.Client
    31Ôćĺ}
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺ// RegisterRoutes registers all API v1 routes on the given ServeMux.
    34Ôćĺfunc RegisterRoutes(mux *http.ServeMux, deps Dependencies) {
    35Ôćĺ	// Public chain: no auth required.
    36Ôćĺ	publicChain := Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery)
    37Ôćĺ
    38Ôćĺ	// Authenticated chain: includes auth unless NoAuth is set.
    39Ôćĺ	chain := publicChain
    40Ôćĺ	if !deps.NoAuth {
    41Ôćĺ		chain = Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery, RateLimit(10, 20), Auth(deps.KeyStore))
    42Ôćĺ	}
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺ	// Projects (CRUD)
    45Ôćĺ	projects := NewProjectsHandler(deps.ProjectsStore)
    46Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.List)))
    47Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Create)))
    48Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Get)))
    49Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Update)))
    50Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Delete)))
    51Ôćĺ
    52Ôćĺ	// Sources (nested under projects)
    53Ôćĺ	sources := NewSourcesHandler(deps.SourcesStore, deps.IngestionService, deps.HTTPClient)
    54Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.List)))
    55Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Create)))
    56Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Get)))
    57Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Update)))
    58Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Delete)))
    59Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/sources/{id}/poll", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.FetchReleases)))
    60Ôćĺ
    61Ôćĺ	// Context Sources (nested under projects)
    62Ôćĺ	contextSources := NewContextSourcesHandler(deps.ContextSourcesStore)
    63Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.List)))
    64Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Create)))
    65Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Get)))
    66Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Update)))
    67Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Delete)))
    68Ôćĺ
    69Ôćĺ	// Releases (read-only, nested under sources and projects)
    70Ôćĺ	releases := NewReleasesHandler(deps.ReleasesStore)
    71Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.List)))
    72Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListBySource)))
    73Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListByProject)))
    74Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.Get)))
    75Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺ	// Semantic Releases (nested under projects + top-level list)
    77Ôćĺ	semanticReleases := NewSemanticReleasesHandler(deps.SemanticReleasesStore)
    78Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListAll)))
    79Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.List)))
    80Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Get)))
    81Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListSources)))
    82Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Delete)))
    83Ôćĺ
    84Ôćĺ	// Subscriptions (CRUD)
    85Ôćĺ	subscriptions := NewSubscriptionsHandler(deps.SubscriptionsStore)
    86Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.List)))
    87Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Create)))
    88Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions/batch", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.BatchCreate)))
    89Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/batch", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.BatchDelete)))
    90Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Get)))
    91Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Update)))
    92Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Delete)))
    93Ôćĺ
    94Ôćĺ	// Channels (CRUD + test)
    95Ôćĺ	channels := NewChannelsHandler(deps.ChannelsStore, routing.NewSenders(), deps.PublicURL)
    96Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.List)))
    97Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Create)))
    98Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Get)))
    99Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Update)))
   100Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Delete)))
   101Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/channels/{id}/test", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Test)))
   102Ôćĺ
   103Ôćĺ	// Agent
   104Ôćĺ	agent := NewAgentHandler(deps.AgentStore)
   105Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/run", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.TriggerRun)))
   106Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/runs", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.ListRuns)))
   107Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/agent-runs/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.GetRun)))
   108Ôćĺ
   109Ôćĺ	// Todos
   110Ôćĺ	todos := NewTodosHandler(deps.TodosStore, deps.PublicURL)
   111Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.List)))
   112Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Get)))
   113Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/acknowledge", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Acknowledge)))
   114Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/resolve", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Resolve)))
   115Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/reopen", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Reopen)))
   116Ôćĺ	// One-click endpoints for notification links (GET so they work as <a href>)
   117Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}/acknowledge", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Acknowledge)))
   118Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}/resolve", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Resolve)))
   119Ôćĺ
   120Ôćĺ	// Onboard (repo dependency scanning)
   121Ôćĺ	ob := NewOnboardHandler(deps.OnboardStore)
   122Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/onboard/scan", chain(http.HandlerFunc(ob.Scan)))
   123Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/onboard/scans/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(ob.GetScan)))
   124Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/onboard/scans/{id}/apply", chain(http.HandlerFunc(ob.Apply)))
   125Ôćĺ
   126Ôćĺ	// Providers (metadata ÔÇö static, no store needed)
   127Ôćĺ	providers := NewProvidersHandler()
   128Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/providers", chain(http.HandlerFunc(providers.List)))
   129Ôćĺ
   130Ôćĺ	// Discovery (public ÔÇö no auth, proxies external APIs)
   131Ôćĺ	discover := NewDiscoverHandler(deps.HTTPClient, "", "")
   132Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/discover/github", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(discover.GitHub)))
   133Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/discover/dockerhub", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(discover.DockerHub)))
   134Ôćĺ
   135Ôćĺ	// SSE events
   136Ôćĺ	events := NewEventsHandler(deps.Broadcaster)
   137Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/events", chain(http.HandlerFunc(events.Stream)))
   138Ôćĺ
   139Ôćĺ	// Health (public ÔÇö no auth middleware)
   140Ôćĺ	health := NewHealthHandler(deps.HealthChecker)
   141Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/health", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Check)))
   142Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/stats", chain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Stats)))
   143Ôćĺ	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/stats/trend", chain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Trend)))
   144Ôćĺ}
   145Ôćĺ
